mitigations.mitigation_name: Deploy inline Snort IPS between firewall and LAN to block outgoing ICMP flood
Create FortiGate egress ACL to deny ICMP from compromised host to attack target (egress filtering)

args.command:
config firewall address
edit "Compromised_Host"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Limit_ICMP_from_Compromised"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "Compromised_Host"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set nat enable
set traffic-shaping "per-policy-shaping"
set profile-protocol-options "default"
set logtraffic all
set status enable
next
end

config firewall address
edit "ICMP_Target"
set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall.policy
edit 0
set name "Drop_ICMP_to_Target_from_Compromised"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "Compromised_Host"
set dstaddr "ICMP_Target"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
set status enable
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "Deny_ICMP_Compromised_to_Target"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "Compromised_Host"
set dstaddr "ICMP_Target"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
set status enable
next
end
